name: Kogan Troubleshooting

Check the shipping service on the consignment in Neto is mapped to a Kogan carrier in your Cresco settings page."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\t\t\t2. If you can\u2019t find that service in the Cresco settings page, the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1385-add-a-shipping-option", "children": [{"text": "shipping option"}]}, {"text": " or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1223-add-or-edit-shipping-rates", "children": [{"text": "rate table"}]}, {"text": " needs to exist in Neto. Note that the prices don\u2019t need to be in the rate table, it just needs to be active and have a name."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Child products not listing individually on Kogan."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cresco\u2019s Kogan integration doesn\u2019t support product variations being listed individually."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set the parent product as "}, {"text": "Approved for Kogan", "bold": true}, {"text": " to list the child products as a variation listing."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shippit tracking doesn\u2019t work."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shipping is not mapped correctly or is missing in Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. Check that Shippit is mapped to a Kogan carrier in your Cresco settings page."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\t\t\t2. If you can\u2019t find that service in the Cresco settings page, the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1385-add-a-shipping-option", "children": [{"text": "shipping option"}]}, {"text": " or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1223-add-or-edit-shipping-rates", "children": [{"text": "rate table"}]}, {"text": " needs to exist in Neto. Note that the prices don\u2019t need to be in the rate table, it just needs to be active and have a name."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-a122638a"}]
